weaknesses: May hallucinate technical specifics if not grounded well

strengths: Total data privacy (crucial for unpatented IP)

feature_capabilities.brainstorming: High suitability - AI can suggest alternative materials, mechanisms, and use-cases.
feature_capabilities.claim_expansion: High suitability - AI can take a base idea and write 'dependent claims'.
feature_capabilities.prior_art_search: Medium suitability - AI is prone to hallucinating patents. Must rely on actual DB queries + AI summarization.
feature_capabilities.formatting: Very High suitability - AI excels at converting plain text into strictly formatted USPTO-style templates.

recommended_architecture: Use Gemini/Claude API (Enterprise Tier for 0-day retention) for generating claims, formatting, and brainstorming. Use a standard database (Supabase) for user management.
